Name: macOS Controls
Description: Sleep, Restart, Shutdown, Empty Trash and Lock Screen on your Mac from the Ulanzi Deck, with a countdown and tap-to-cancel safety.

Actions.Name: Sleep
Actions.Tooltip: Put the Mac to sleep after a countdown (tap to cancel)

Actions.Name: Restart
Actions.Tooltip: Restart the Mac after a countdown (tap to cancel)

Actions.Name: Shutdown
Actions.Tooltip: Shut down the Mac after a countdown (tap to cancel)

Actions.Name: Empty Trash
Actions.Tooltip: Empty the macOS Trash instantly (no countdown)

Localization.sleepHint: Tap once to start the countdown. Tap again before it ends to cancel. When it reaches zero, the Mac goes to sleep.
Localization.restartHint: Tap once to start the countdown. Tap again before it ends to cancel. When it reaches zero, the Mac restarts.
Localization.shutdownHint: Tap once to start the countdown. Tap again before it ends to cancel. When it reaches zero, the Mac shuts down.
Localization.trashHint: Tap to empty the Trash immediately, with no confirmation. Finder’s “warn before emptying” option is disabled so no dialog is shown.
Localization.lockHint: Tap to lock the screen immediately. The first time, macOS may ask for the Accessibility permission for Ulanzi Deck; without it the display is turned off instead and locks according to the system’s “require password” setting.
